headline: Public Speaking
description: Public speaking is one of the most common fears (glossophobia) — yet also one of the most valuable skills. Key principles: know your audience, structure (intro-body-conclusion), practice aloud, use stories, control pace, make eye contact. It's not about being perfect — it's about connecting. Toastmasters: global public speaking practice organization.

citation.name: The Art of Public Speaking (Stephen Lucas, 13th Ed)
